example_cases.expected_output: No direction selection presented, flow proceeds directly from Step 0 to Layer 2

example_cases.description: Feature mode Layer 2 inherits tech stack from profile
example_cases.expected_output: Layer 2 output includes inherited tech stack, user not asked to re-select tech

example_cases.description: Feature mode skips design philosophy extraction
example_cases.expected_output: No philosophy extraction step, proceeds to UI Taste or Layer 3

example_cases.description: Feature mode Layer 3 generates regression guard ACs
example_cases.input: mode=feature, requirement that touches existing module
example_cases.expected_output: Generated AC includes at least one regression_guard type EARS criterion
example_cases.setup: Profile with existing modules, feature touching one of them

example_cases.description: Regression guard references specific existing behavior
example_cases.expected_output: Regression guard AC references 'existing auth behavior' specifically, not generic

example_cases.description: Feature mode UI Taste uses REFINE not REIMAGINE
example_cases.input: mode=feature, product has frontend, profile has designDNA
example_cases.expected_output: UI Taste uses creativeRange: REFINE, not REIMAGINE

example_cases.description: Feature mode writes artifacts to specs/features/feat-xxx/
Feature artifacts reference profile by path, not copy
example_cases.expected_output: Artifact contains context_dependencies referencing .nopilot/profile/ path, profile content not duplicated inline

property_cases.property: When mode=greenfield, all discover stages execute identically to pre-brownfield behavior — no feature mode branches activate, no profile reading occurs except the initial mode detection
Feature-scoped discover artifacts never contain copied profile content; all profile references are by path only
